Title: Inflation Surge
Description: Every 10% oil rise → 0.4% inflation increase & 0.15% GDP reduction (IMF)

Title: Stagflation Risk
Description: Combination of weak growth + high inflation threatens global recession

Title: Supply Chain Disruption
Description: Higher transport costs cascade through all goods and services

Title: Oil Exporter Windfall
Description: Net oil exporters see increased revenues, investment, and GDP growth

Title: Accelerated Green Transition
Description: High prices incentivize renewable energy, EVs, and energy efficiency

Title: Reduced Consumption
Description: Consumers cut driving, shift to public transport & fuel-efficient vehicles

Title: Short-term Emissions
Description: Developing countries may increase coal/dirty fuel use as oil substitute

Title: Reduced Purchasing Power
Description: Low-income households disproportionately affected; less disposable income

Title: Cost of Living Crisis
Description: Transport, food, heating costs all rise with fuel prices

Title: Rockets & Feathers Effect
Description: Prices rise fast when oil goes up but fall slowly when it drops

Title: Long-term EV Adoption
Description: High prices accelerate shift to electric/hybrid vehicles, reducing future exposure

Title: Balance of Payments Crisis
Description: Oil-importing developing nations face severe foreign exchange drain

Title: Poverty Increase
Description: Rising fuel + food prices push millions below poverty line

Title: Weak Market Response
Description: Limited ability to quickly reduce oil dependency; lack of alternatives

Title: Diversification Push
Description: Crisis creates urgency to explore domestic renewable energy sources

Title: Regional Destabilization
Description: Conflict disrupts 20% of world oil supply through Strait of Hormuz
